messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Per-swarm Telegram creds: front_desk_supervisor.bb resolves botToken/chatId/bridgePort by swarm_name from a fleet creds file, env fallback for primary
How it works: A non-primary swarm resolves its bot token and chat id from its fleet creds file, not the environment
